name: daily-growth-report
description: Daily snapshot + human-readable summary of your OpenClaw evolution. Posts to Discord for review, then forwards to Notion on ✅ reaction.
author: 龍蝦補完計畫 共學團

files.description: Config template — copy to config.json and fill in IDs
Build today's snapshot into the shadow git repo
First-run bootstrap: derive user_name from workspace/USER.md and persist to config.json
Invoked after ✅ reaction; publishes approved draft to Notion
Step-by-step install guide for 共學團 members
Pointer to canonical schema in notion-api skill's database-registry
Discord ✅ → Notion approval flow design (delegates Notion writes to notion-api skill)
Cron job templates to register with openclaw cron

delegates_to.notion-api: All Notion reads/writes. Database = 「學習分享」, registered as entry #7 in notion-api/references/database-registry.md. This skill does NOT call notion-* MCP tools directly — agent turns are instructed to consult the registry and use notion-api's conventions.
